subcodes.title: Words to May Maxwell et al, spoken on 1898-02-22
subcodes.first_line: If your hearts are turned always towards God, and filled with the love of God, that love will separate them from all other things, that love will be the wall
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity
